title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Taj Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Taj Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Taj Hotels! We are hiring a Reservation Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Taj Hotels:
Taj Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
